description: Whether a promo code was used (Yes/No)
Count of prior purchases (used as loyalty proxy)
Payment method used for this transaction
Annual purchase frequency (numeric conversion of frequency_of_purchases)
Weighted promo score 0–100: 40% discount + 40% promo_code + 20% inverse purchase history
Organic Loyalist / Selective Promo User / Promo Dependent / Bargain Hunter (quartile-based)
Composite 0–100: 35% prev_purchases + 25% frequency + 20% rating + 10% subscription + 10% low promo. NOT true retention — timestamps absent.
Behavioral loyalty score: 30% purchase_count + 30% total_spend + 20% satisfaction + 20% low promo
Commercial loyalty score: 30% spend + 25% AOV + 20% frequency + 15% subscription + 10% no discount
Selected from Behavioral Loyalty (Definition 1) — winner by consistency score 4/4
High/Medium/Low Opportunity based on 5-flag scoring (density, spend, promo, satisfaction, HV share)
New (0-5) / Developing (6-15) / Established (16+) based on previous_purchases
Actionable customer segment — see segment definitions in README
